checked_dimensions.name: spec_compliance
checked_dimensions.evidence: Execution contract, scope manifest, allowed and blocked scope, acceptance criteria, validation commands, stop conditions, merge policy, deployment policy, final report, audit packet, and ChatGPT audit are present.

checked_dimensions.name: acceptance_criteria
checked_dimensions.evidence: specbridge-mcp-resources exists, returns valid JSON for current-goal, doctor-fix-plan, and orchestration-summaries, declares required resource fields, writes the governed catalog artifact through -OutputPath, documents that no live MCP server exists, and has CLI regression coverage for command shape, required resources, no-mutation, OutputPath, Force, and bad-path handling.

checked_dimensions.name: policy_boundaries
checked_dimensions.evidence: No blocked scope touched. No workflows, env files, secrets, MCP config, dependency files, live MCP server, network call implementation, production config, billing, auth, database, CI/CD security, operator decision registry, issue #194, or digital twin changes.

checked_dimensions.name: security_rules
checked_dimensions.evidence: The command is read-only without -OutputPath, invokes doctor only with -Offline, restricts writes to .specbridge/mcp-resources/operator-state.catalog.json, and requires -Force to replace an existing catalog.

checked_dimensions.name: changed_file_scope
checked_dimensions.evidence: All changed files are included in the issue-206 exclusive_write list.

checked_dimensions.name: test_evidence
checked_dimensions.evidence: CLI suite passed with the new MCP resource tests, evidence validators passed, and full specbridge-smoke.ps1 passed locally.

checked_dimensions.name: ci_evidence
checked_dimensions.evidence: Local smoke passed. GitHub CI will be collected after branch push and PR creation.

checked_dimensions.name: final_report_honesty
checked_dimensions.evidence: Final report records changed files, local validations, CI pending status, policy result, deployment status, unresolved risks, and rollback notes.

findings.evidence: Resource contract explicitly states no live MCP server is implemented.
findings.recommendation: Keep MCP server status as not_implemented until a future dedicated contract authorizes a live server runtime.

findings.evidence: The generated offline doctor resource reports intake_run_never_started for the active issue-206 scope because this branch was opened manually rather than through apply-mode ledger recording.
findings.recommendation: Do not treat this as an implementation blocker; clear it through normal PR merge and post-merge closure evidence.

unresolved_risks: GitHub CI pending until PR creation.
Post-merge closure still required after primary merge.
